headline: 10 ETFs investors should consider in Q2
summary: Equity exchange-traded fund (ETF) inflows saw a 9-month low in the first quarter.Strategas Securities chief ETF and technical strategist Todd Sohn paints a picture of the ETF trade right now, highlighting macro conditions affecting the market and outlining his expectations for the second quarter.

headline: Invesco Ltd. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) will release its first quarter 2026 results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The earnings release and presentation materials are scheduled to be released and posted to the Investor Relations section of the Company's website, invesco.com/corporate, at approximately 7 a.m. ET. A conference call to discuss Invesco's results will be held at 9 a.m. ET on that day; the live audio webcast and replay can be accessed through the same website under Events and Earnings Releases.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Invesco, Lowers Price Target to $26
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $28 to $26.
